task_description: Replace the network init code (doLoopback in internal/cli/rc/rc.go) with u-root's libinit.NetInit() which uses netlink to bring up the loopback interface. Since kernel 6.8+ handles loopback address/route configuration automatically, the old shell-out to /sbin/ip for adding 127.0.0.1/8 and routes is no longer necessary.

verification.summary: All make targets pass (build, test, lint). Tests use AST parsing to verify libinit.NetInit is called and exec.Command is not used in doLoopback. Tests are meaningful - they would fail if the change is reverted.

review_feedback_applied.issue_1_kernel_comment: Added comment documenting kernel 6.8+ requirement at the doLoopback call site.
review_feedback_applied.issue_2_error_propagation: Deliberately left unchanged - not a regression since old code also swallowed errors. libinit.NetInit logs to kernel ring buffer which is acceptable for init.
review_feedback_applied.issue_3_redundant_test: Removed TestRcGo_ImportsLibinit - compilation and the AST test already prove the import exists.
